pages.text: Energium is a unique ore containing clusters of elemental energy. It exists in two forms: Depleted and Pure. Both versions generate in mountain biomes, but with different frequencies and conditions.

pages.title: Depleted Energium Ore
pages.text: Depleted ore generates between heights 16 and 256 in mountains. It can be found rarely and lacks special properties, but can be refined into useful materials.

pages.title: Energium Ore
pages.text: Pure ore generates extremely rarely between levels 16 and 48. Its main feature is suppressing elemental power. Used to craft powerful tools and blocks.

pages.title: Refining Depleted Energium
pages.text: To convert a Depleted Energium Ingot into a pure one, combine it with Redstone and an Energium Upgrade Smithing Template at a smithing table. Templates can be found in ancient Energium temples or duplicated via a special craft.

pages.title: Purification Recipe
pages.text: Requires Depleted Energium Ingot, Redstone, and an upgrade template.

pages.title: Template Duplication
pages.text: Use 7 diamonds and an original template to create copies.

pages.title: Energium Tools
pages.text: Tools possess unique properties:$(br2)$(l)Legendary Durability$() — 3 times more durable than iron.$(br2)$(l)Revenge Enchantment$() — Attacks inflict $(#FF0000)Power Lock$() on targets for 8 seconds.$(br2)$(l)Isolation Enchantment$() — Protects the wielder from $(#FF0000)Power Lock effects.

pages.title: Energium Armor
pages.text: A full armor set grants:$(br2)$(l)Suppression Aura$() — Blocks elemental power within 4 blocks.$(br2)$(l)Curse Immunity$() — Neutralizes all effects of the Cursed World

pages.title: Battery Charger
pages.text: The Battery Charger is a device that charges elemental batteries using power from elemental stones. Provides temporary elemental energy storage with limited capacity.

pages.title: Battery Charger Recipe
pages.text: Requires:$(br)6x Depleted Energium Ingots$(br)2x Redstone$(br)1x Nether Quartz

pages.title: Elemental Batteries
pages.text: Key features:$(br2)- Stores 500 star points (non-renewable)$(br)- Lasts 5 minutes (vs stones' 10)$(br)- Charges in Battery Charger (30 seconds)

pages.title: Empty Battery Recipe
pages.text: Base component for all elemental batteries. Must be charged in Battery Charger before use.

pages.title: Usage Mechanics
pages.text: 1. Place Battery Charger$(br2)2. Insert Empty Battery$(br3)3. Provide elemental stone$(br4)4. Wait 30 seconds$(br5)5. Retrieve charged battery
Important limitations:$(br2)- Batteries cannot be recharged$(br)- Star points deplete permanently$(br)- Destroyed when empty$(br2)Best for sharing power with a friend or in emergency situations.
